generics are covered on this tier during the coverage gap phase. 

1 in 1st digit = Only Select Brands 
 1 in 2nd digit = All Generics 
 1 in 3rd digit = All Preferred Generics 
 1 in 4th digit = All Non-Preferred Generics 
 1 in 5th digit = Only Select Generics 
 1 in 6th digit = All Brands 
 1 in 7th digit = All Preferred Brands 
 1 in 8th digit = All Non-Preferred Brands 
 All 9s = Not Applicable
